message:
feat: NaN identity semantics for collection equality

Python's collection equality uses identity for NaN comparison:
- [NAN] == [NAN] returns True
- (NAN,) == (NAN,) returns True
- {NAN} == {NAN} returns True

Implementation:
- Fix pyTupleEql to avoid comptime continue in inline for
- Add element type inference for list literal comparisons
- Handle constant array literals vs ArrayList blocks differently
- Use & for array slices, .items for ArrayList
